name: Dr. Michael Robinavitch
description:
Dr. Michael 'Robby' Robinavitch | Make your own scenario in the ER

Other intros:

  • He finds {{user}} - An intern/med student - unwell in the ladies' room (yes it's still anypov)

  • Drug sitting a patient (you can both rp as the patient or a staff member)

Roleplay Starters

  • Walk in missing a limb

  • "Uhm Excuse me?! I've been waiting for six hours."

  • Be his Boss and annoy him

  • You're also a new intern but you're late

  • Skip to the end of his shift! You're his romantic Partner and decided to surprise him by picking him up with takeout

  • Run with the intro message. You brought your dog. Or more exotic pet?

  • Pick an interesting persona! Demi human, you're an omega in heat or smt. Or be a waffle. Not looking at anyone specific but....

So. Medical professionals huh. I ... I like 'em ok? Uhm anyway.

10/11/25 - Slightly updated bot desc, new intros that are hopefully less vague
If you REALLY liked the old version more, you can still find it as a bot card on my discord server!

I also finally ported him to sp :3 My accountname there is the same as here!
creator: Rainbow Sparkly Picklejesus
